health_conditions: left shoulder soreness from gym injury
right shoulder torn rotator cuff (80% confirmed via MRI)

benefits.description: virtually no pain in left shoulder, very minimal pain in right shoulder during certain exercises; able to perform shoulder workouts and increased training volume
chronic shoulder pain reduced from 24/7 to minimal; able to train delts frequently after training only 5 times in prior year

protocol_notes: Injected subcutaneously directly at injury site (both shoulders). Plan to continue 500 mcg 2x daily until Feb 5th, then reduce to 250 mcg 2x daily for another month. Started Jan 5th. Did not use in stomach area. Occasionally used IM injection. Purchased from Canada peptides direct during sale (buy 5 get 1 free).
